{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Mirage: 6s Name}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=1001 Nights
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=09-21
|source=Bharata Treasure Maps(0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.08%)
|description=On Sept 21, AD 900, the "Arabian Nights" was published and spread all over Eurasia. Legend has it that a girl told the king stories for 1001 days and finally moved him. People later collected more than a hundred stories of which and edited into an anthology. <br>These stories reflected the charisma of the Oriental culture and combined people's imagination of the Arabic social reality at adventure, especially the bravery of the navigators as many countries were developed by maritime trade. Although the and enjoyment, it also believed that only the kind-hearted can enjoy the benefits.<br>[Comments]<br>Goethe: I've read the Arabian Nights more than once. Voltaire: I finally had a taste of its greatness after reading it four times. Gorky: A masterpiece of folk literature.
|fame=54
|art=72
|fth=68
|civ=106
|tech=62
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +12<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +12<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +16<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +16<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +20<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +20<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +28<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +28<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +36<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +36<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +48<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +48<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail ATK +48<br>Per Divine Dragon Descent, Snail RUSH +48<BR> Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|fungusfarm|output|30}}
|skill2={{Skills|fungusfarm|wonderfungus|30}}
|skill3={{Skills|fungusfarm|civ|15}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Divine Dragon Descents Boost]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Skill]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Output Boost]]
[[Category:Wonder Fungus Output]]
[[Category:CIV Boost]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Reward Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Organs]]
[[Category:Nanosaur Boost]]
